sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.9.67: New auto-sync: WP Cron runs every 15 min, imports MotoPress bookings with rooms+nights in single pass. Manual sync button still works. Old two-step import replaced.
  • 1.8.9.66: Calendar room rows: reduced font-size to 9px, row height to 13px, first column bold. Transfer guest search inputs now match dropdown width. Booking detail guest fields tightened to prevent overflow.
  • 1.8.9.65: Calendar now remembers horizontal scroll position after saving popups or reloading the page. Removed orphaned extras field from quick booking popup (day-level extras handled via calendar cell clicks).
  • 1.8.9.64: Remove overlay table entirely. manual_tarif migrated to booking_rooms. Name edits go directly to guest table. Notes from booking_notes table only.
  • 1.8.9.63: Fix quick booking popup ignoring overlay manual_guest_name (popup showed DB name instead of overlay name).
  • 1.8.9.62: Add pagination to top of Bookings and Guests pages (was bottom only).
  • 1.8.9.61: Invert selected month tab style (white bg, dark text) for better visual distinction.
  • 1.8.9.60: Fix stale calendar cache after editing booking guest info; add nocache_headers to REST calendar endpoint.
  • 1.8.9.59: Highlight current month on calendar with green underline; Back to Calendar now links to booking's check-in month.
  • 1.8.9.58: Fix MotoPress import to only accept confirmed bookings; stop importing abandoned/cancelled/pending.
  • 1.8.9.57: Add room night date repair tool; fix import matching bug for non-Booking.com channels.
  • 1.8.9.56: Extend occupancy query to include yesterday for bread order.
  • 1.8.9.55: Add dashboard REST API endpoint with API key auth; add Dashboard API Key field to settings page.
  • 1.8.9.54: Add fuzzy search to guest transfer dropdowns; fix sync bugs (MotoPress pagination, doNext loop, ICS DELETE batching, transactions, guest matching).
  • 1.8.9.53: Fix bookings page showing no results due to missing rooms_table variable in SQL query.
  • 1.8.9.52: Fix bookings list to properly display room codes and count.
  • 1.8.9.51: Show room codes instead of just room count in bookings list.
  • 1.8.9.50: Fix nonce handling for booking save operation.
  • 1.8.9.49: Add “Back to Calendar” link to booking detail page.
  • 1.8.9.48: Fix nonce handling for booking transfers in guest detail page.
  • 1.8.9.47: Add booking transfer functionality to Booking Detail and Guest Detail pages.
  • 1.8.9.46: Add transfer to guest functionality.
  • 1.8.9.45: Skip cancelled MotoPress bookings during import (only import confirmed bookings).
  • 1.8.9.44: Removed debug logging and cleaned up guest creation code.
  • 1.8.9.43: Added deep debugging for guest creation to identify database insert/retrieve issues.
  • 1.8.9.42: Improved guest creation flow with better debugging and separate find/create steps.
  • 1.8.9.41: Fixed MotoPress mapping to include first_name and last_name fields for proper guest matching.
  • 1.8.9.40: Added detailed debugging for booking creation to track guest ID assignment.
  • 1.8.9.39: Fixed guest matching inconsistency between preview and import by using same guest data in both phases.
  • 1.8.9.38: Fixed guest matching to prevent false matches by disabling name-only matching.
  • 1.8.9.37: Fixed guest creation by removing 'state' field (not in guests table schema).
  • 1.8.9.36: Added debugging for guest creation to identify why guests aren't being created.
  • 1.8.9.35: Pass all guest details (address, phone, etc.) to guest creation during booking import.
  • 1.8.9.34: Save full guest details (address, phone, email, etc.) when creating guests during MotoPress import.
  • 1.8.9.33: Extract full guest details from MotoPress API response (address, phone, email, etc.).
  • 1.8.9.32: MotoPress sync always uses 'website' channel.
  • 1.8.9.31: Map MotoPress channel to website when source is 'website', use date_created for contacted_date.
  • 1.8.9.30: Improved MotoPress guest name extraction from API response.
  • 1.8.9.29: Create guests automatically during MotoPress booking import when not found.
  • 1.8.9.28: Sync MotoPress bookings via REST API (like preview/import) before falling back to background synchronizer.
  • 1.8.9.27: Use dedicated admin sync action and sync MotoPress rooms from configured sync URLs only.
  • 1.8.9.26: Render sync notice via admin_notices so it stays on main admin page, not inside calendar content.
  • 1.8.9.25: Force sync button to true circle and show sync notice only on main admin page after redirect.
  • 1.8.9.24: Make sync button fully round and move sync notice to main calendar page after redirect.
  • 1.8.9.23: Make calendar sync button icon-only and queue all MotoPress room iCal syncs together with Booking.com ICS sync.
  • 1.8.9.22: Restrict Booking.com auto-cancel to ICS skeleton bookings only.
  • 1.8.9.21: Clear calendar cache on plugin update so confirmed-only calendar rules apply immediately.
  • 1.8.9.20: Show only confirmed bookings on calendar.
  • 1.8.9.19: Hide cancelled bookings from calendar.
  • 1.8.9.18: Hide merged archive bookings from calendar so merged manual booking shows correctly.
  • 1.8.9.17: Fix Merge Bookings menu page to use working Merges candidate view instead of broken empty query.
  • 1.8.8.91: Mark missing Booking.com reservations cancelled when ICS no longer shows their UID.
  • 1.8.8.90: Make room pricing use adults + children (babies excluded) in backend and live form previews.
  • 1.8.8.89: Add Booking Merges approval tool to combine same-channel same-date different-room bookings into one booking.
  • 1.8.8.88: Add Booking.com ICS grouping debug preview to inspect multi-room reservation keys before grouping imports.
